title: EXPLAINED: How Oscar Piastri's Crash Unfolded - 2026 F1 Australian GP Melbourne
description:
EXPLAINED: How Oscar Piastri's Crash Unfolded - 2026 F1 Australian GP Melbourne.

Oscar Piastri’s crash during the reconnaissance laps at the 2026 Australian Grand Prix caught a lot of attention — but incidents like this reveal far more than just a mistake.

In this video, I break down what likely happened in the moments leading up to the crash at Albert Park Circuit from both a technical driving perspective and the mental side of an F1 driver preparing for a race session.

title: 2026 F1 Australian GP RACE Analysis - Melbourne
description:
2026 F1 Australian GP RACE Analysis in Melbourne! 

What a race in Melbourne. The 2026 season explodes into life at the Australian Grand Prix with a huge result for Mercedes-AMG Petronas Formula One Team.

George Russell delivers a flawless drive to take victory around Albert Park, controlling the race from the front and managing the new-era F1 machinery perfectly. But the real headline might be the incredible performance from rookie sensation Kimi Antonelli, bringing the car home in P2 to secur

title: 2026 F1 Australian GP QUALIFYING Analysis - Melbourne
description:
2026 F1 Australian GP QUALIFYING Analysis - Melbourne. Qualifying at the Australian Grand Prix delivered a huge result, with George Russell putting his Mercedes on pole position at Albert Park after a tightly contested session.

Russell nailed the lap when it mattered most in Q3, finding the limit through the fast middle sector and extracting everything from the car under the 2026 regulations. With the new cars producing less downforce than previous seasons, precision and commitment in high-spee

title: F1 Australian GP DATA ANALYSIS: Who Has RACE PACE?
description:

title: F1 TESTING EXPLAINED: Why the Fastest Lap is a LIE! 🤫🏎️
description:
Don't be fooled by the Bahrain timing screens! 🏁 In this video, we dive deep into how F1 Winter Testing actually works. From fuel loads to engine mapping and "sandbagging," I’ll explain why the record times you see don’t tell the full story for the 2026 season.

We analyze:

The "Sandbagging" strategy 🎒
Fuel levels & weight impact ⛽
Why teams hide their true pace 🔴
Subscribe for more technical F1 analysis!

title: 2026 F1 Engine & Battery Deployement Explained (MGU-K)
description:
F1 2026 just introduced one tiny word in the regulations — “pending” — and it completely changes how drivers use the throttle on corner exit.

In this video I break down what a power-limited pending period actually means in driver language, why the car no longer gives a sudden hybrid “kick”, and how the 150kW rule forces drivers to commit to throttle earlier instead of waiting for a boost moment.

You’ll learn:
• What “power-limited” vs “traction-limited” really feels like in the car
• Why the b
